STORAGE SAFETY RULES         \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500         \u2022 This contract inherits SubscriptionStorageLayout \u2014 the SAME layout           as V1.  Slot order is identical.         \u2022 Do NOT declare new state variables here or in the layout above any           existing variable.  New variables must always be appended at the           BOTTOM of SubscriptionStorageLayout.  Inserting earlier will shift           slot assignments and corrupt logicContract / owner / all mappings.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/SubscriptionLogicV2.sol":"SubscriptionLogicV2"},"evmVersion":"shanghai","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/SubscriptionLogicV2.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0b4a7714695bfe118887112e4d5e498031ea66ced7d84766a8790ce9b4f5ab27","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://e7ab81e8f70bee5e71169b716c3233b97c74c3abcdb4196b421c6a3829dd75f7","dweb:/ipfs/QmVXLcWKKFDmLZGZqSbJFWgHhfLE8wEdMXY4onGAvNw44p"]},"contracts/SubscriptionStorageLayout.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8c99ca850fe9ca69ba386944a322dd81106fd249714d5f0d35ebcaaacfa0225e","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://0c8261ed81fcc72c177227c906a9eb880da587e72d7c0db5d8e827ee8be4767d","dweb:/ipfs/QmPGEXvSzE99nXiVXdTuecC6ZGTnfPMxmekq7f5xvJTTpx"]}},"version":1}

params.duration: Length of the subscription in seconds.
params.price: Cost in wei to subscribe to this plan.

params.plan: The plan identifier to subscribe to.

addPlan(string,uint256,uint256).notice: Register or update a subscription plan.

isActive(address).notice: Returns true if the user has an active, non-paused subscription.

logicContract().notice: Address of the currently active logic (implementation) contract.

owner().notice: Address of the contract owner, set once in the proxy constructor.

pauseAccount(address).notice: Pause a subscriber's account so `isActive` returns false.         Only the owner can pause an account (e.g. for ToS violations).

planDuration(string).notice: Maps a plan name to its duration in seconds.

planPrices(string).notice: Maps a plan name to its price in wei.

resumeAccount(address).notice: Resume a previously paused account.         Paused time is NOT credited back — the original endTime stands.

subscribe(string).notice: Subscribe (or renew) a sender's account to a plan.         Must send exactly the plan price in ETH.

subscriptions(address).notice: Maps a subscriber address to their Subscription record.
